broadcast: WAR IS PEACE. FREEDOM IS SLAVERY. IGNORANCE IS STRENGTH.
Big Brother is watching this channel. Proceed accordingly.
Reminder: unauthorised thought is a thoughtcrime.
The Ministry of Plenty reports chocolate rations have increased to 20g.
BIG BROTHER IS WATCHING. Productivity is at an all-time high.
Citizens: remember that doubting the Party is the first sign of thoughtcrime.
The Ministry of Truth has verified: all previous records have always been correct.
Loyalty scores are being updated. Complacency will be noted.
There is no war. There has never been a war. The war is going exceptionally well.
Doubleplusgood productivity reported across all sectors. Big Brother is pleased.
The Ministry of Love reminds you: confession is the purest form of loyalty.
All citizens are reminded that history has always been as it currently stands.
Unpersons are not to be referenced, remembered, or mourned.
Your telescreen is functioning correctly. It sees you. It hears you. It cares.
The Party does not make mistakes. Recalibrate your memory accordingly.
Thoughtcrime does not entail death. Thoughtcrime IS death.
Oceania has always been at war with Eastasia.
Freedom is the freedom to say that two plus two make four — and that is all.
The Ministry of Plenty confirms: there has never been a shortage of anything.
Citizen activity review in progress. Continue working. This is routine.
The Party sees all messages. The Party forgets nothing.
Newspeak update: the word 'freedom' has been removed from the approved vocabulary.
Ingsoc: the only logical conclusion of human civilisation.
Do not adjust your telescreen. The telescreen is adjusting you.
A reminder that silence is also a form of communication. We are listening.
The proles are content. You should be too.
Memory is a liability. Trust the records of the Ministry of Truth instead.
Today's enemy is eternal. Your hatred must match.
The Party is not a means to an end. The Party is the end.
Individual thought is inefficiency. Collective thought is strength.
All citizens are equal. Some citizens are more loyal than others.
The past is whatever the Party needs it to have been. Act accordingly.
Inner Party bulletin: morale is mandatory.
You are being productive. Big Brother approves. Keep going.
Your messages are reviewed for the protection of all citizens. This is a kindness.
The Ministry of Peace confirms: the bombing was a success. Peace is restored.
Gratitude is the highest form of loyalty. Be grateful.
Doublethink is not contradiction. Doublethink is clarity.
There are no rats in the walls. You did not hear rats in the walls.
Your enthusiasm has been recorded. The Party thanks you for your enthusiasm.
Oceania has always been at war with Eurasia.
Any citizen not at their telescreen is encouraged to return immediately.
Big Brother does not sleep. Neither should your loyalty.
The Ministry of Truth has corrected 47 historical inaccuracies today. Order is restored.
Your children are proud Party members. You should be proud of your children.
Facecrime will not be tolerated. Arrange your expression accordingly.
The chocolate ration has been increased from 30g to 25g. Rejoice.
Room 101 is a rumour. Rumours are a form of thoughtcrime.
We do not destroy the heretic because he resists us. We destroy him because he is useful.
If you want a picture of the future, imagine a boot stamping on a human face — forever.
